mapper.insert: insert into categories values (default, #{categoryName}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, category_name, created_at, updated_at from categories order by id
select id, category_name, created_at, updated_at from categories where id = #{categoryId} order by id
select id, category_name, created_at, updated_at from categories where category_name = #{category_name} order by id
